title: astragalus vexans
intro: Astragalus vexans, also known as the Vexed Milk Vetch, is a plant species belonging to the legume family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its adaptogenic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Astragalus vexans include its ability to enhance immune function, reduce stress and fatigue, and exhibit antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. Astragalus vexans can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional medicinal formulas.
